name: evidence-led-litigation-review
description: Local evidence dossiers, timelines, location-specific proofreading, and evidence-first review for Japanese litigation filings.

interface.shortDescription: Cache, map, proofread, and review Japanese litigation filings.
interface.longDescription: Combines local evidence extraction, deterministic two-sided consistency triage, line-and-column proofreading, a diagonal chronology map, and a reusable Codex reasoning workflow. It separates fast text navigation from original-source verification, maps allegations to exhibits, lists exact repair locations, tests anticipated defenses, and revises Japanese litigation filings without making the Python tools call a model API.
defaultPrompt: この訴状を証拠、論点、因果関係・損害、反論、表現の順でレビューしてください。
この証拠説明書と本文の号証・立証趣旨を双方向に照合してください。
この書面の誤記、誤変換、括弧及び号証のずれを行・文字位置付きの校正一覧にしてください。
証拠を高速確認用テキスト台帳へ取り込み、重要資料は原本確認へ戻したうえで、双方の書面との不整合候補を整理してください。
